title: DaYunRequest
description: Request contract for POST /calculate/bazi/dayun. Computes Da Yun (Decade Pillars / luck pillars) for a natal chart. The direction in which decades flow is resolved either from the year stem yin/yang and the subject's sex_at_birth, or explicitly from a caller-supplied flow_direction. Exactly one mechanism must be specified. TODO: replace `$id` host before production release.

date.description: Local civil date-time of birth in ISO 8601 form (e.g. 1987-07-04T21:30:00). Interpreted in the IANA timezone given by `tz`.

tz.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g. Europe/Berlin, America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires). Pattern catches simple typos; full IANA validity is enforced by the calculation backend.

as_of_date.description: ISO date used to determine which decade is current. Defaults to today (server-side) if omitted.

boundary.description: Day-boundary convention used by the underlying BaZi engine when resolving the day pillar.

standard.description: Time standard for interpreting the local datetime.

direction_method.description: How the flow direction of the decades is determined. `year_stem_yinyang_and_sex` derives it from year-stem polarity combined with `sex_at_birth`. `explicit` requires the caller to supply `flow_direction` directly.

flow_direction.description: Required when direction_method = 'explicit'. The direction in which decades progress from the birth month pillar.

sex_at_birth.description: Required (non-null) when direction_method = 'year_stem_yinyang_and_sex'. Otherwise may be null.

start_age_method.description: Method for converting the distance to the anchoring solar term (jieqi) into a start age. Currently only the classical 3-days = 1-year mapping is supported.

cycles.description: Number of decade cycles to return.

strict.description: If true, the endpoint returns a 422 error envelope when a required direction basis is missing rather than degrading silently.

oneOf.title: explicit-direction
oneOf.description: Caller supplied flow_direction explicitly; sex_at_birth is not required.

oneOf.title: year-stem-yinyang-and-sex
oneOf.description: Direction derived from year-stem yin/yang and sex_at_birth; sex_at_birth must be 'male' or 'female'.
